summary: JWT Authentication feature (P0) fully tested and working. All 19 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend auth flows verified with Playwright: login page, demo account buttons, sign in, logout, protected routes, role-based UI.
critical_code_review_comments: auth_middleware.py: Clean JWT implementation using HS256 with 72-hour expiry
auth.py router: Properly excludes _id from MongoDB responses via _safe_user()
Protected routes: /api/program/* properly protected, /api/mission-control correctly unprotected
Frontend AuthContext: Token stored in localStorage with proper axios header management
Role-based UI: Director sees view switcher, Coach does not - correctly implemented
LoginPage: Demo account quick-fill buttons work correctly with data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: 3 default users seeded via startup.py (director-1, coach-williams, coach-garcia)
context_for_next_testing_agent: JWT Auth fully implemented. Token stored in localStorage under 'capymatch_token'. Only /api/program/* routes are protected; other routes like /api/mission-control, /api/events, /api/advocacy are NOT yet protected. Coach Williams has 0 athletes assigned (athletes assigned to Coach Martinez/Rivera).

auth_login: Director login success (email, name, role, token returned)
auth_register: Register new coach - creates user and returns token
Register new director - creates director role user
auth_me: GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns current user
role_based_access: Coach gets view_mode=coach with filtered data
Director can pass coach_id to see coach's filtered view
token_validation: New registration token immediately usable for /me

login_page: Sign In and Create Account tabs present
Demo account buttons (Director, Coach Williams, Coach Garcia) work
Director demo button fills credentials correctly
authentication_flow: Header shows user name (Director Adams / Coach Williams)
program_intelligence: Director sees view switcher (Program View, Martinez, Rivera buttons)
Coach does NOT see view switcher (correctly hidden)
create_account: Create Account tab shows Full Name field
Create Account tab shows Role selector (Coach/Director)

verified_features: POST /api/auth/login returns token and user object
POST /api/auth/register creates new user and logs in
GET /api/auth/me returns current user from token
Director sees view switcher on Program Intelligence
Coach does NOT see view switcher on Program Intelligence
Logout clears session and redirects to /login
